title: Extract a stateless header into a function component
prompt:
Write lib/my_app_web/components/page_header.ex (module MyAppWeb.PageHeader). Define a function component page_header/1 with attrs :title (string, required), :subtitle (string, default nil), and a default slot :inner_block. Render

{@title}

{@subtitle}

{render_slot(@inner_block)}
.
tier_rationale: Single-step decomposition: extract a stateless header. Canonical component shape.
